adversarialCases.scenario: CF/manual-cardio/running surfaces must not start the gym timer.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Non-gym activity tabs open their surfaces while timerStarted remains false.

adversarialCases.scenario: Diet add buttons must open quick-add before routing to search, direct, photo, or skip flows.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Breakfast/lunch/dinner/snack buttons open meal quick-add; actions route to existing flows.

adversarialCases.scenario: Production Pages could serve an old commit or stale service-worker asset set.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Deploy verifier sees commit 8fada73 and cache marker tomatofarm-v20260703z22-input-ux-timer-guard; marker verifier sees all input UX app markers.

adversarialCases.scenario: Browser QA could hide unclassified console errors behind a passed verdict.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Known AppCheck/headless/SDK messages are classified; unclassifiedConsoleIssues=[] and pageErrors=[].

adversarialCases.scenario: Evidence could expose raw Firebase/API keys or credentials.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Evidence secret scan finds no matches; AppCheck URL key is redacted.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Write the final plan, then implement intuitive/commercial-grade entry UX for gym exercise, meal, and running/cardio inputs.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Production Tomato Farm Pages serves the completed input UX with behavior, cache, regression, review, and browser evidence.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: The shipped flow exposes first-class workout activity entries, standalone manual cardio, and meal quick-add routing while preserving project constraints.
